title: Vibrant Rainbow Border Number 4 Birthday Candle (7cm x 12cm) - Stunning Multi-Colored Party Decor - Uniquely Crafted for Celebratory Milestones - 1 Pc
features: VIBRANT RAINBOW DESIGN: Add a splash of color to your celebration with our stunning vibrant rainbow border number 4 birthday candle, perfect for milestone occasions and making a memorable statement at your party.
QUALITY WAX MATERIAL: Crafted from high-quality wax, this durable and visually striking candle ensures a safe and delightful birthday experience that can last throughout your entire event.

PERFECT FOR ANY MILESTONES: Cherish life's special moments with our intricately designed birthday candle, tailormade for commemorating those important milestones - whether it's a child's first birthday or a one-of-a-kind anniversary event.

EASY TO USE: Simply place the 7cm x 12cm candle atop your cake or dessert, and light it up to instantly bring life to your party.The easy-to-use design ensures a hassle-free celebration, creating a memorable moment for everyone involved.

BOOST YOUR PARTY'S AMBIENCE: Elevate your event's atmosphere with this eye-catching, multi-colored candle, guaranteeing smiles and excitement for guests of all ages, and ensuring your celebration stands out among the rest.
description: From the manufacturer Rainbow Border Numeral Candles Show your age in elegant fashion with these bright and vibrant candles! These rainbow bordered candles are an ideal addition to any Birthday with a rainbow motif, so make a wish and blow out the candles!
